summary: Adds public holidays to the main calendar. Each selected country becomes its own toggleable calendar in the sidebar, so users can show or hide holidays independently.

sections.title: Setting up countries
sections.content: Use the Countries picker to choose one or more countries. Each country you add will appear as a separate calendar entry in the sidebar — enabling you to show holidays for a global congregation.

sections.title: Filtering by category
sections.content: Holidays are tagged by type: Official, Observances, Bank Holidays, Seasonal, and Religious. Leave all categories unselected to show every holiday, or pick specific types to narrow the display.

sections.title: Showing and hiding individual countries
sections.content: Each country produces its own calendar row in the sidebar. Use the per-calendar toggle to temporarily hide a country without changing your plugin settings.
